text_original: It may be found on the left hand and on the right.
text_normalized: It may be found on the left hand and on the right.

text_original: All things depend on it for their production, which it gives to them, not one refusing obedience to it.
text_normalized: All things depend on it for their production, which it gives to them, not one refusing obedience to it.

text_original: When its work is accomplished, it does not claim the name of having done it.
text_normalized: When its work is accomplished, it does not claim the name of having done it.

text_original: It clothes all things as with a garment, and makes no assumption of being their lord;
text_normalized: It clothes all things as with a garment, and makes no assumption of being their lord;

text_original: - it may be named in the smallest things.
text_normalized: - it may be named in the smallest things.

text_original: All things return (to their root and disappear), and do not know that it is it which presides over their doing so;
text_normalized: All things return (to their root and disappear), and do not know that it is it which presides over their doing so;

text_original: - it may be named in the greatest things.
text_normalized: - it may be named in the greatest things.

text_original: Hence the sage is able (in the same way) to accomplish his great achievements.
text_normalized: Hence the sage is able (in the same way) to accomplish his great achievements.

text_original: It is through his not making himself great that he can accomplish them.
text_normalized: It is through his not making himself great that he can accomplish them.
